vocab.per farlo: to do it; to make it

advancedVocab.chi e chi: who is who (expression for identifying people)

vocab.dover: to have to; must (note: likely a typo for 'dover(e)')

advancedVocab.appuntamenti: appointments; meetings (can refer to scheduled meetings, not just romantic dates)

vocab.se riesco: if I manage; if I succeed

advancedVocab.qualcosina: a little something; something small (diminutive, affectionate)

advancedVocab.quindi però: so but; therefore however (unusual combination of discourse markers)
